seo.title: Luxury Interior Design — Cotswolds, Ludlow & Chelsea
seo.description: Savery's of Broadway creates luxurious, timeless interiors for private residences and luxury hotels. Hand upholstery workshop, premium fabrics showroom, and expert design service. Established 1942. Studios in Broadway, Ludlow and Chelsea.

hero.heading: Cotswolds Interior Design — Since 1942
hero.subtitle: A luxury interior design studio rooted in the Cotswolds, crafting considered spaces since 1942.

studioIntro.heading: A studio of quiet intention
studioIntro.body: At Savery's, we believe the most beautiful rooms are those that feel as though they have always existed. Our approach is one of restraint and consideration — where every fabric, finish and form is chosen not for trend, but for truth.

steps.title: Listening
steps.description: Every project begins with a conversation about how you live, what you value, and what a room should feel like.

steps.title: Sourcing
steps.description: We work directly with fabric suppliers from around the world, carefully chosen crafts people and source only the very best products to bring into our workrooms based in Broadway, in the heart of the Cotswolds.

steps.title: Composing
steps.description: From placement of furniture to final dressing, every detail is attended to until the room feels complete.

items.title: Full home interior design
items.description: Complete room and property schemes, from concept through to final styling.

items.title: Hand upholstery & reupholstery
items.description: Hand-tied springs, seasoned hardwood frames, and fabrics finished by hand at our Broadway workshop.

items.title: Bespoke furnishings
items.description: Statement curtains, handmade blinds, cushions, and headboards — designed and made to order.

items.title: Bespoke furniture
items.description: Sofas, chairs, and one-off commissions designed and bench-built from the frame up in the Cotswolds.

items.title: Curtains & soft furnishings
items.description: Bespoke curtains, blinds, cushions, and headboards made in-house at our Ludlow workroom.

items.title: Fabric and material sourcing
items.description: Access to the finest mills and makers — linens, wools, silks, velvets, and beyond.

items.title: Furniture sourcing & antiques
items.description: A considered mix of antiques and contemporary pieces, chosen for character and craftsmanship.

items.title: Colour consultation
items.description: Considered palettes that feel natural and enduring, chosen for the way light moves through your space.

items.title: Home staging
items.description: Presenting properties at their finest for sale — styling and dressing spaces so buyers see a home.

items.title: Project management
items.description: From concept to installation, we oversee every detail so our clients can enjoy the process.
